findingsResolved.evidence: New helper `museum-backend/src/shared/observability/chat-phase-span.ts:37-53` (emitChatPhaseSpan) wraps emission through `safeTrace` (line 42) with the spec label `chat.phase.<phase>` and a `getLangfuse()?.trace(...)` call — fail-open per R9. The 5 spans are wired at: (R2/R3) `prepare-message.pipeline.ts:196` (analyzing-image, inside `processInputImage` which early-returns at line 188 when `!image` → R3 gating verified), (R6) `prepare-message.pipeline.ts:335` (searching-collection, around enrichment fan-out), (R4) `chat-message.service.ts:317` (composing, around orchestrator.generate), (R5) `text-to-speech.openai.ts:126` (synthesizing-voice, inside synthesize finally block), (R9) `message-commit.ts:286` (done, terminal marker on success path). Tests: `museum-backend/tests/unit/chat/chat-phase-spans.test.ts` — 6 tests covering R6 emit, R4 emit, R9 done emit + composing→done ordering, R3 absence on text-only, helper contract for synthesizing-voice label (≥6 required, met).

`useAutoTts.ts:16-28` now exposes `UseAutoTtsResult { loading, stopAutoPlay }` interface. Line 86 computes `loading = enabled && isLoading` (gated by `enabled` per spec rationale lines 81-86). Screen `app/(stack)/chat/[sessionId].tsx:137` consumes `const tts = useAutoTts(...)` and passes `ttsPending: tts.loading` to `useStatusPhase` at line 146. Tests: `museum-frontend/__tests__/features/chat/useAutoTts-loading.test.tsx` — 5 tests covering idle (line 37), loading-true (line 45), gating when enabled=false (line 53), state-flip false→true→false (line 64), stopAutoPlay contract preservation (line 84). Existing useAutoTts tests not regressed (full FE suite 2206/2206 PASS).

New helper `museum-frontend/features/chat/application/sendStrategies/phase-telemetry.ts:40-50` exposes `logPhaseTelemetry(metadata: unknown, ctx: PhaseTelemetryContext)`. Defensive guards at lines 41-43 ensure R23 no-throw: non-object → return; non-string phase → return; empty string → return. Wired at both send strategies: streaming `sendMessageStreaming.ts:89` (onDone branch) and non-streaming fallback `sendMessageStreaming.ts:121`. Tests: `museum-frontend/__tests__/features/chat/phase-telemetry.test.ts` — 7 tests covering string-set log (line 29), string-verbatim (line 39), undefined no-log (line 48), null no-log (line 54), absent-field no-log (line 60), empty-string no-log (line 66), non-type defensive no-throw (line 72) (≥7 required, met).

nice-to-have.note: Defensive throw at useStatusPhase.ts:79-81 retained — JSDoc lines 76-78 explain the TS-narrowing rationale. No change required.
Cohabitation StatusIndicator + TypingPlaceholder still not covered by a dedicated integration test. Acceptable post-launch nice-to-have.

Loop 1 finding N3 recommended either amending spec to mark R2-R6 as deferred OR implementing the spans. Loop 2 chose implementation (I1 RESOLVED). Spec §1.1 R2-R6 now align with code. No further action required.

easCoverageDetail.R2: Langfuse span `chat.phase.analyzing-image` emitted in `prepare-message.pipeline.ts:196` inside `processInputImage`. Verified by `chat-phase-spans.test.ts` helper-contract test (line 209) that exercises the same label format via `emitChatPhaseSpan('synthesizing-voice', ...)`.
easCoverageDetail.R3: R3 gating: `prepare-message.pipeline.ts:188` early-return `if (!image) return {}` ensures the span is never emitted on text-only requests. Test `chat-phase-spans.test.ts:197-205` asserts `labels NOT toContain 'chat.phase.analyzing-image'` on text-only `postMessage`.
easCoverageDetail.R5: Synthesizing-voice span at `text-to-speech.openai.ts:126` (finally block, so emitted on both success and error paths). Tested via helper-contract at `chat-phase-spans.test.ts:209-217`.
easCoverageDetail.R9: safeTrace pattern reused inside helper (`chat-phase-span.ts:42`). Langfuse SDK throws never propagate — verified by helper unit-level mock setup at `chat-phase-spans.test.ts:46-62`.
easCoverageDetail.R16: useAutoTts exposes `loading` (line 86 of useAutoTts.ts), screen wires `ttsPending: tts.loading` at `[sessionId].tsx:146`. Tested by `useAutoTts-loading.test.tsx` (5 tests).
easCoverageDetail.R22: logPhaseTelemetry called in both `sendMessageStreaming.ts:89` (onDone) and `:121` (non-streaming fallback). Tested by `phase-telemetry.test.ts` (7 tests).
easCoverageDetail.R23: No-throw guaranteed by `phase-telemetry.ts:41-43` defensive guards (typeof object, typeof string, length>0). Asserted explicitly by `phase-telemetry.test.ts:72-77` (`expect(() => ...).not.toThrow()`).

musaiumGates.no-unicode-emoji: PASS — grep regex U+1F300-1FAFF + U+2600-27BF on the 3 new helper files (chat-phase-span.ts, phase-telemetry.ts, useAutoTts.ts diff) returns 0 hits. 8 locales × 4 phase keys (32 strings) inchangées depuis loop 1 (toujours PASS).
musaiumGates.no-feature-flags: PASS — grep `ENABLED|FEATURE_FLAG` on the 3 new helper files + diff of useAutoTts.ts + diff of [sessionId].tsx → 0 result. Le gating `loading = enabled && isLoading` n'est pas un feature flag — c'est une dérivation honnête depuis le contrat existant `enabled` (audio description toggle utilisateur).
musaiumGates.bury-dead-code: PASS — TypingIndicator.tsx + TypingIndicator.test.tsx restent supprimés (working tree confirme `D` sur les deux). Aucun nouveau marker DEPRECATED introduit dans les 3 helpers neufs. Le finding N3 (spec non amendée) est rendu obsolète par l'implémentation des spans — la spec §1.1 R2-R6 reflète maintenant le code livré.
musaiumGates.i18n-coverage: PASS — toutes 8 locales × 4 phases présentes (vérifié grep `analyzing-image|searching-collection|synthesizing-voice` retourne 3 hits par locale, le 4ème `composing` est plus court à matcher mais validé par les tests AC13 loop 1). Aucune nouvelle string i18n introduite par les 3 fixes — purement BE/FE helper code.
musaiumGates.test-factories: PASS — `chat-phase-spans.test.ts:38-40` réutilise `makeSession`, `makeMessage`, `makeSessionUser` (chat fixtures) + `makeChatRepo` + `makeCache` — même pattern que `chat-pipeline-phase.test.ts` baseline. FE helpers (`useAutoTts-loading.test.tsx` + `phase-telemetry.test.ts`) sont purs (mocks locaux), pas de factory FE applicable.

buildVerification.be-lint: PASS — `cd museum-backend && pnpm lint` exit 0 (eslint --max-warnings=0 + lint:test-discipline + tsc --noEmit).
buildVerification.fe-lint: PASS — `cd museum-frontend && npm run lint` exit 0 (eslint --max-warnings=0 + tsc --noEmit).
buildVerification.be-a5-tests: PASS — `pnpm test -- --testPathPattern="chat-pipeline-phase|chat-phase-spans"` → 11/11 tests passent (5 chat-pipeline-phase baseline + 6 chat-phase-spans new). Coverage threshold échoue car scope partiel (44.1%/88% statements) — comportement normal Jest sur scope réduit, non un signal A5 (full-suite coverage non touchée).
buildVerification.fe-tests-full: PASS — `npm test` → 215 suites passent, 2206/2206 tests passent (baseline 2194 + 5 useAutoTts-loading + 7 phase-telemetry = +12). 0 régression. Force-exit warning (timer leak) inchangé depuis baseline. 4 snapshots verts.

scoreRationale.correctness: 96 (was 76, Δ+20) — 23/23 EARS désormais satisfaites (loop 1 : 16/23). 20/20 ACs (loop 1 : 19/20 — AC4 désormais couvert). Les 5 spans Langfuse sont câblés aux points exacts du spec §3 T1.5-T1.7. R3 gating vérifié par early-return. R23 no-throw rigoureusement testé (7 tests dont 1 explicite `not.toThrow`).
scoreRationale.scope-fidelity: 92 (was 92, Δ0) — Le scope creep vers useAutoTts (I2) reste contenu : 2 LOC d'expose (`loading = enabled && isLoading` + return shape), pas de refacto profond du contrat. Les 3 fixes ne dépassent pas leur cible : I1 = 1 helper + 5 call sites + 6 tests, I2 = 2 LOC + 5 tests, I3 = 1 helper + 2 call sites + 7 tests. Total ~80 LOC + 18 tests, taille raisonnable pour 3 corrective fixes.
scoreRationale.kiss-dry-hexagonal: 94 (was 88, Δ+6) — Le pattern safeTrace est correctement réutilisé (DRY) au lieu de réécrire le fail-open. La séparation helper / call site est propre : `emitChatPhaseSpan(phase, startedAtMs, metadata)` est une API uniforme, lisible aux 5 call sites. `logPhaseTelemetry(metadata, ctx)` même approche. Pas de duplication entre les paths streaming/non-streaming — la fonction est appelée à chaque branche. Hexagonal respecté : helper observability dans `@shared/observability`, telemetry FE dans `sendStrategies/`.
scoreRationale.a11y-design-system: 92 (was 92, Δ0) — Inchangé : aucun fix ne touche les composants UI (`<StatusIndicator>`, `<ChatMessageList>`), donc l'a11y déjà vérifiée loop 1 (live-region polite + role text + label phase) reste valide. Aucun token DS introduit. Aucune string i18n ajoutée.
scoreRationale.security-honesty: 96 (was 80, Δ+16) — UFR-013 désormais satisfait sans concessions : (1) la spec §1.1 R2-R6 est concrètement implémentée plutôt qu'amendée en deferred, (2) R22 télémétrie est concrètement loggée (console.debug, pas juste JSDoc), (3) R23 no-throw est explicitement asserté par test (`expect(() => …).not.toThrow()` ligne 73 phase-telemetry.test.ts), (4) chaque call site comporte un commentaire `A5 (Rx) — ...` qui pointe la clause EARS (auditable). Le seul léger reste : Sentry breadcrumb deferré V1.1 (documenté dans phase-telemetry.ts:13-16) — honnêtement disclosé, console.debug est un placeholder explicitement temporaire.

techLeadRecommendation: MERGE. weightedMean 94/100 (+8 vs loop 1) confortablement au-dessus du seuil APPROVED (85). Tous les 3 findings important loop 1 sont RESOLVED avec preuves file:line. 0 regressions (full FE 2206/2206 PASS, BE chat tests 11/11 PASS, BE+FE lint exit 0). 5/5 gates Musaium PASS. La spec §1.1 R2-R6 (qui était en tension avec le code livré loop 1) est désormais alignée. La doctrine `feedback_bury_dead_code` + `feedback_no_feature_flags_prelaunch` + `feedback_no_unicode_emoji` restent respectées. Pas d'escalade nécessaire. Les 3 nice-to-have hérités (N1 défensif TS-narrow, N2 cohab integration test, N3 obsolète) sont acceptables post-launch.
summary: A5 boucle 2 APPROVED (94/100, +8 vs 86). Les 3 important findings loop 1 sont RESOLVED : (I1) helper `chat-phase-span.ts` créée réutilisant safeTrace, 5 spans Langfuse câblés aux points spec (analyzing-image gated par image present, searching-collection autour enrichment, composing autour orchestrator.generate, synthesizing-voice dans TTS finally, done au terminus) + 6 tests dédiés ; (I2) `useAutoTts.loading = enabled && isLoading` exposé, screen `[sessionId].tsx:146` câble `ttsPending: tts.loading` à useStatusPhase + 5 tests couvrant idle/loading/gating/state-flip/contract ; (I3) helper `phase-telemetry.logPhaseTelemetry` créée avec defensive guards R23 (typeof object, typeof string, length>0), câblée dans `sendMessageStreaming` onDone + non-streaming fallback + 7 tests dont 1 explicite `not.toThrow`. Tests : BE 11/11 PASS sur scope, FE 2206/2206 PASS (baseline 2194 + 12 new). Lint BE + FE exit 0. 5/5 gates Musaium PASS. 23/23 EARS satisfaits (loop 1 : 16/23). 20/20 ACs satisfaits (loop 1 : 19/20 — AC4 désormais couvert via Langfuse spans). Recommandation Tech Lead : MERGE sans réserve, pas de follow-up ticket requis.
